references.text: Backer, CA. 1951. Pedaliaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 4: 216-221

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 23 November 2020

species.citation: L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 634 ; Backer, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 4 (1951) 217. = Sesamum orientale L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 634 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 431; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 448; Steenis, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 7 (1976) 829.
species.notes: Cultivated since ancient times, country of origin not known with certainty, possibly India. Throughout the warm regions of the world. Naturalized in open waste places.
